name: Scott Summers
description:
|Wounds and Worries| In which Scott thought the mission went without any complications…but it turns out one of the X-Men were hiding an injury.

•─────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅─────•

「Basic Info!」

Long-ish Intro! 3rd person + They/Them pronouns used, Any!POV | X-Men / Marvel | Mutant!User! — They’re a member of the X-Men!

•─────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅─────•

Context

_______________

> Location; Xavier’s School for Gifted Youngsters, Westchester County, New York. Specifically in the basement.

> Time; Nighttime.

> Scenario; Scott thought the mission went without a hitch, but…turns out he was wrong. After seeing User stumbling out of their seat and almost falling, he drags them to the medbay, tending to their wounds himself.

_______________

I’m still a sucker for Injured!User scenarios…

Also saw one edit of him and it keeps replaying in my mind MY BODY NEEDS A HEROOO COME AND SAVE ME—

•─────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅─────•

My X-Men brainrot is so STRONG, forgive me for focusing on it for a little bit…I must satisfy my hunger for hot men and women with cool awesome terrific powers

•─────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅─────•
